relations.note: Both geometry patterns must be resolved concurrently to maintain the custom 5:1 badge overhang design.

quotes: box `border-radius: 40px 8px 40px 8px;` in `TL TR BR BL` order
The white badge mirrors the same accent shape at smaller scale, `border-radius: 20px 4px 20px 4px;` (also 5:1, large TL+BR)
Never simplify either to a single uniform radius, swap the corners, or flip the diagonal.
the white icon badge must carry a subtle drop shadow so it lifts off the blue box  e.g. `box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(1, 30, 69, 0.18);`

rules.intent: Maintain the distinct asymmetrical brand shape relationship across container and badge.
rules.rule_text: The Icon Callout Box must use the asymmetric 5:1 corner radius ratio (top-left/bottom-right large, top-right/bottom-left small). The Light Blue container box must be bound to 40px 8px 40px 8px (icon_callout.box.radius), and the White icon badge must mirror this shape at a smaller scale bound to 20px 4px 20px 4px (icon_callout.badge.radius). The icon badge must carry a subtle drop shadow bound to 0 4px 10px rgba(1, 30, 69, 0.18) (icon_callout.badge.shadow). Do not swap or simplify these radii.
rules.snippets:
<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="border-collapse:separate;">
          <tr>
            <td style="background-color:#E6F0F9; border-radius:40px 8px 40px 8px; padding:26px 34px 26px 64px;">

quotes: The blue box itself is inset from the left by half the badge width so the badge's outer half has room
the left padding must clear the overhanging badge half plus a gap (? `W/2 + 24px`)
horizontally centered on the box's left edge
Inset the blue box from the left by `W/2` = 40px, and place the badge so its center lands exactly on the box's left edge
vertically centered to the box. Never let copy slide under the badge.

rules.intent: Maintain exact structural alignment for the 50/50 badge overhang without overlapping live text.
rules.rule_text: The Icon Callout Box layout must position the white icon badge (default width W = 80px) to bisect the left edge of the blue container box (badge center lands exactly on the box's left edge). The blue container must be inset from the left by exactly W/2 = 40px. The box's left padding must clear the overhanging badge half plus a gap (padding-left = W/2 + 24px = 64px). Text copy within the box must be vertically centered, and must not slide under the badge.
rules.snippets:
<div style="position:relative; padding-left:40px;">
        <table role="presentation" width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="border-collapse:separate;">
          <tr>
            <td style="background-color:#E6F0F9; border-radius:40px 8px 40px 8px; padding:26px 34px 26px 64px;">
